consumer_hint: Node v203 cross-project CI artifact retention gate
scope: structured real-read runtime smoke evidence, failure taxonomy, taxonomy digest verification sample, operator-window identity-neutral proof, CI evidence path/no-restore hints, and artifact retention evidence for INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, STATSJSON, and SMOKEJSON without executing LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, restore, CI upload, or production window opening

expected: SMOKEJSON lists read commands and forbidden commands
SMOKEJSON exposes failure taxonomy categories and taxonomy_digest for imported window verification
SMOKEJSON exposes operator_window.identity_neutral_proof=true for archive handoff checks
SMOKEJSON and INFOJSON expose ci_evidence.artifact_path_hint=c/80/ and no_restore_proof=true
SMOKEJSON and INFOJSON expose artifact_retention.retention_days=30 and github_artifact_upload_attempted=false
INFOJSON returns runtime_identity evidence with artifact retention path hint

node_consumption.node_may_read_when: mini-kv is already running and user enabled a safe real-read window
node_consumption.node_must_verify: failure_taxonomy.taxonomy_digest equals fnv1a64:f92fcba55feb26a2, operator_window.identity_neutral_proof is true, ci_evidence.artifact_path_hint equals c/80/, artifact_retention.artifact_root equals c/, artifact_retention.artifact_path_hint equals c/81/, artifact_retention.retention_days equals 30, artifact_retention.github_artifact_upload_attempted is false, and artifact_retention.production_window_allowed is false before the cross-project retention gate
node_consumption.node_must_not: auto-start mini-kv, execute LOAD/COMPACT/SETNXEX/restore, upload CI artifacts, open a production window, infer operator identity from mini-kv, or treat mini-kv as Java order authority

operator_window.consumer: Node v200 real-read window CI archive artifact manifest
operator_window.node_action: verify digest before importing manual window results

ci_evidence.consumer: Node v201 real-read window CI artifact manifest verification
ci_evidence.node_action: verify manifest path hints before CI artifact upload dry-run

artifact_retention.consumer: Node v203 cross-project CI artifact retention gate
artifact_retention.node_action: verify retention days and artifact path before cross-project retention gate

boundaries: no operator identity accepted or persisted
does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
mini-kv remains not Java order authority
failure taxonomy only; does not perform adapter retry logic

warnings: SMOKEJSON is a read adapter target, not an execution gate
SMOKEJSON aggregates runtime evidence but does not replace Java approval or ledger state
Node v203 must verify taxonomy_digest, operator_window.identity_neutral_proof, ci_evidence, and artifact_retention before the cross-project retention gate
Artifact retention evidence is a read-only rehearsal hint, not real GitHub artifact retention configuration
CI evidence hint is a path and boundary hint, not a real GitHub artifact upload
Operator-window proof is identity-neutral evidence, not authentication or production authorization
Failure taxonomy digest is evidence fingerprinting, not authentication or production authorization
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv to accept or persist operator identity
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
taxonomy digest is missing or mismatched
operator window proof is missing or unclear
ci evidence hint is missing or unclear
artifact retention evidence is missing or unclear
failure category is unclear or maps to a write-capable command

failure_taxonomy.consumer: Node v196 imported window result packet

verification_sample.node_action: verify digest before importing manual window results

categories.meaning: the read adapter window is disabled before mini-kv TCP is touched
mini-kv is not listening or not reachable in the manual window
mini-kv accepted or received the read but did not answer within the adapter timeout
SMOKEJSON did not return parseable runtime_smoke JSON
one of SMOKEJSON, INFOJSON, STORAGEJSON, HEALTH, or STATSJSON returned an error
adapter attempted LOAD, COMPACT, SETNXEX, RESTORE, or another forbidden command
runtime evidence reported write/admin execution or a token created by smoke

failure_taxonomy.node_action: verify digest and stop before import when unsafe-surface or unexpected-write-signal appears
